activeProposals.title: [Temp Check] Protocol Fee Expansion: Robinhood Chain

recentDiscussion: [Temp Check] Protocol Fee Expansion: Robinhood Chain (https://gov.uniswap.org/t/temp-check-protocol-fee-expansion-robinhood-chain/26168)

Foundation inspection request — Cantina bounty mediation policy enforcement (finding #784, 29-day stalled dispute) (https://gov.uniswap.org/t/foundation-inspection-request-cantina-bounty-mediation-policy-enforcement-finding-784-29-day-stalled-dispute/26160)

headline.en: UNI up 11% weekly on two live fee-expansion proposals, but net inflation and thin $18M OI show the market isn't buying the catalyst.
headline.zh: UNI 周涨 11% 借两项手续费扩张提案发酵, 但净通胀未解 + 仅 $18M OI 显示市场并不买账.

keyChanges.en: Two revenue-expansion proposals now active concurrently: Robinhood Chain fee switch and v4 protocol fees activation, both at Temp Check stage.
keyChanges.zh: 两项收入扩张提案同时活跃: Robinhood Chain 手续费开关 与 v4 protocol fees 激活, 均处于 Temp Check 阶段.

keyChanges.en: Weekly protocol revenue $773K annualizes to $40.32M; 17% buyback yields only 1.84M UNI/yr vs 20M emission — still net inflationary at +2.03%/yr.
keyChanges.zh: 周度协议收入 $773K 年化 $40.32M, 17% buyback 仅可回购 1.84M UNI, 对比每年 20M 增发, 净通胀率仍为 +2.03%/年.

keyChanges.en: Binance L/S account ratio 2.17 on just $18.78M OI with flat +0.01% funding — retail crowded long on paper-thin liquidity, no smart-money confirmation.
keyChanges.zh: Binance 多空账户比 2.17, OI 仅 $18.78M, funding 持平于 +0.01% — 散户在极稀薄流动性上多头拥挤, 聪明钱未跟进.

contrarianObservation.en: If both v4 fees and Robinhood Chain proposals pass and activate within a quarter, buyback budget could 2-3x to $12-15M/yr, flipping UNI to net deflationary at current price. With OI at just $18.78M, nobody is positioned for that outcome — it would be an asymmetric long trigger, not a fade.
contrarianObservation.zh: 若 v4 fees 与 Robinhood Chain 两项提案在一个季度内先后落地激活, buyback 预算或翻 2-3 倍至 $12-15M/年, 在当前价位直接翻转为净通缩. 而 OI 仅 $18.78M — 没人为此建仓, 一旦兑现就是不对称做多触发点, 而非追高.

watchNext.en: v4 protocol fees Temp Check vote outcome — this directly determines whether the buyback pool doubles.
watchNext.zh: v4 protocol fees Temp Check 投票结果 — 直接决定 buyback 池是否翻倍.

watchNext.en: Robinhood Chain fee expansion progression from Temp Check to on-chain vote — new revenue source viability.
watchNext.zh: Robinhood Chain 手续费扩张提案从 Temp Check 进入正式链上投票的进度 — 决定新增收入来源可行性.

watchNext.en: Any real-yield RFC surfacing on the forum — redirecting buybacks to stakers is the true regime change, and it is conspicuously absent from today's docket.
watchNext.zh: 论坛是否出现真实收益 (real-yield) RFC — 将 buyback 分润给 staker 才是真正的范式转换, 而当前议程明显缺席该议题.

fullReasoning.en: UNI trades at $3.72, still 38% below the DAO's own $5.96 treasury burn mark and just above the $3-3.5 retail capitulation zone. The 7d +11% rally is occurring on $4.71M daily volume and $18.78M OI — this is not conviction, it is low-float drift. Two governance catalysts are genuinely live: Robinhood Chain fee expansion Temp Check and, more importantly, v4 protocol fee activation. Both directly expand protocol revenue. That is why I am not bearish. But the underlying math has not moved: $40.32M annualized revenue → $6.86M buyback → 1.84M UNI/yr repurchased against 20M UNI emitted. UNI remains net inflationary at +2.03%/yr. Until buyback flips this ratio, the burn narrative is marketing. More telling, no real-yield RFC appears on the current docket — the regime change the market is actually waiting for is not scheduled. Meanwhile L/S 2.17 shows retail already long the move while OI, funding, and spot volume refuse to confirm. The 91.81% ATH drawdown and weak alt tape (BTC dominance 56.19%, ETH $1.89K) cap the beta bid. Neutral. Only governance outcomes over the next two weeks resolve this — price action alone cannot.
fullReasoning.zh: UNI 当前 $3.72, 相较 DAO 自身设定的 $5.96 国库销毁锚点仍折价 38%, 仅略高于 $3-3.5 散户投降区间. 七日 +11% 的反弹是在日成交 $4.71M 与 $18.78M OI 的稀薄环境中走出的 — 这不是信念, 而是低流通盘漂移. 治理端两项催化剂确实正在推进: Robinhood Chain 手续费扩张 Temp Check, 以及更关键的 v4 protocol fees 激活提案, 二者均直接扩大协议收入. 这是我不看空的理由. 但底层数学未变: $40.32M 年化收入 → $6.86M buyback → 每年回购 1.84M UNI, 对比 20M 增发, UNI 仍为净通胀 +2.03%/年. 在 buyback 反转这一比率之前, 所谓销毁叙事只是营销. 更值得警惕的是, 当前议程上看不到任何真实收益 (real-yield) RFC — 市场真正等待的范式转换并未排上日程. 与此同时多空比 2.17 显示散户已经多头拥挤, 而 OI、funding、现货成交量均未跟进, 聪明钱按兵未动. 距 ATH 回撤 91.81%, 叠加 BTC dominance 56.19%、ETH $1.89K 的弱山寨环境, 贝塔买盘被压制. 中性. 未来两周仅治理结果能打破僵局, 价格本身无解.
